title: Requirement Modeling Process Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the strategic flow of activities and decisions involved in selecting and applying requirement modeling techniques for a software project.
elements: Create Models (e.g., Use Case, ERD, DFD)
relationships: Process flows sequentially from 'Elicit Requirements' to 'Manage Evolving Requirements', with a feedback loop from 'Validate & Verify Models' back to 'Analyze Requirements' for rework.
